# Testing Findings PSIRT Assurance

Define testing strategy, normalize supplied findings, plan remediation validation, support vulnerability intake and PSIRT coordination, and perform independent assurance for artifacts not authored by the reviewer. Require human approval for critical closure, disclosure, active testing, release, and risk decisions.
